case_title: ZAREKEIVAN GEORGE VS THE CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAREKEIVAN GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24341 ON 4-4-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
S C A 24341. JUDGE NICHOLAS CARLIN ORDERED PLAINTIFF'S PETITION FOR REHEARING GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,088.99 FILED BY ZAREKEIVAN GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAREKEIVAN GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $1,588.99 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,603.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
